categories.label: Life Skills
categories.blurb: Real-world smarts — money, safety and healthy choices, learned by playing.

categories.label: Indian Mythology
categories.blurb: Adventures from the Indian epics — run, herd and aim alongside the heroes.

categories.label: Words & Letters
categories.blurb: Spell, unscramble and grow your vocabulary.

categories.label: Brain & Numbers
categories.blurb: Puzzles, logic and quick math to flex your thinking.

categories.label: Creativity
categories.blurb: Draw, design, make music and create your own art.

games.title: Market Day
games.description: Run the shop! Add up the basket and give the right change before the customer leaves.

games.title: Budget Hero
games.description: You have ₹100 and a shopping list. Buy the needs, skip the wants, don't overspend!

games.title: Cross the Road Smart
games.description: Wait for green, look both ways, use the zebra crossing. Get across safely!

games.title: Healthy Plate
games.description: Build a balanced meal from the right food groups and score your healthy plate!

games.title: Hanuman Run
games.description: An Indian-mythology endless runner — leap over rakshasas, duck under arrows, race to Lanka!

games.title: Krishna's Cows
games.description: Be Krishna the Gopala — play your flute and herd all the cows safely home before sunset!

games.title: Arjuna's Aim
games.description: Physics archery — set the angle, pull for power, read the wind, and strike the eye of the fish!

games.title: Word Scramble
games.description: Unscramble the letters before the timer runs out. Levels, lives and combos!

games.title: Spelling Bee
games.description: Listen to the word and type it correctly. Hear it again, use hints, beat the timer!

games.title: Brain Quest
games.description: Quick brain teasers and learning challenges. Learn while you play!

games.title: Math Blast
games.description: Solve quick math problems against the clock. Pick your difficulty and beat your best!

games.title: Maze Runner
games.description: Find your way through the maze to the flag. Arrow keys, buttons or swipe. Beat the clock!

games.title: Spirograph
games.description: Slide the gears and watch beautiful spiral patterns draw themselves. Save your art!

games.title: Doodle Pad
games.description: Draw, paint and stamp emojis to make your own picture, then save it!

games.title: Kaleidoscope Draw
games.description: Every line you draw is mirrored into a magical kaleidoscope pattern.

games.title: Animal Band
games.description: Tap the animals to make funny sounds, record a song and play it back!

games.title: Dress Up
games.description: Mix and match characters, hats and accessories to create your own friend. Save it!
